name: LIFO Inventory Valuation

eligibility.description: Requires a formal election and consistent use of the method for financial reporting to shareholders or for credit purposes (the LIFO conformity rule).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers to use the Last-In, First-Out (LIFO) method to value inventory, which can reduce taxable income during periods of rising costs by matching recent, higher costs against current sales.
